message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question" with value "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" accordingly. "feedback" with text explaining issues. "complies" boolean.

Given text: "Šis pētījums ir nozīmīgs gam akadēmiskajā vidē gan arī praktiskajā tehnoloģiju attīstībā, jo decentralizēto finanšu sistēmu izaugsme prasa jaunas un efektīvas pieejas."

We need to evaluate:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text does not list any chapters. So fails. Feedback: It does not list sections. Complies false.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false.

Thus all false.

We need to output JSON array with three objects. Each object: "question": "Chapters", etc. Provide feedback. Let's craft feedback.

For Chapters: "Text does not contain any chapter titles or list of sections; it only provides a general statement about importance."

Description: "The text does not mention any specific sections or describe their content; it only states the significance of the research."

Structure: "The passage gives no indication of how the thesis is organized; there is no outline or description of structure."

All false.

Return JSON array.
